description: Device swap 2025-08-05 (last value 67.26). Handled by 2-segment split B201.VP1_VMM61:d.A | :d.B via rolling_sum.

Register-read corruption / pre-deployment artifacts pre-2025-10-09. :d.A has 13 days of zero readings then a stuck-high artifact at 662831.21 for 8 days (same pattern as the B217.Å1_VMM71 ÅNGA register corruption — wrong register polled). :d.B is a further 5-day artifact at 23724. Neither segment is trustworthy. Previously handled as a multi-swap rolling_sum producing a compounded ~687 GWh stitched total, which was nonsense given the meter's real ~4 kWh/day rate. Canonical :d now slices from :d.C alone (valid_from=2025-10-09), accepting that pre-Oct-9 data is unrecoverable. :d.A and :d.B retained as raw refs for audit. 2025 annual is missing pre-Oct-9 consumption; Jan/Feb 2026 facit comparisons unaffected.
Device swap 2025-01-07 (last value 1758.83). Coincident with B334, B337, B341 swaps — suggests a coordinated device-family replacement. Split A|B via rolling_sum.
Device swap 2025-01-07 (last value 983.69). Coincident swap family (B330, B334, B337, B341). Split A|B via rolling_sum.
Device swap 2025-01-07 (last value 296.97). Coincident swap family. Split A|B via rolling_sum.

Device swap 2025-01-07 (last value 1520.07). Coincident swap family. Not currently carrying a multi-segment split in timeseries_refs.csv — may be covered by a valid_from on the existing raw ref. Review if a rolling_sum split is needed.
Counter went offline 2025-10-18 at value 4582.21. Leaf meter.
Counter went offline 2025-02-13 at value 158.73. Outside Jan/Feb 2026 reference period.

B310.VP2_VMM61 is the primary värme distribution node with 23 children across B301–B305, B311, B312, B313, B317, B341, B385. Not currently flagged as having issues in Jan/Feb 2026 Excel comparisons, but is the obvious candidate for sum-children patching if it ever goes offline.

Primary värme distribution node offline 2025-09-20 through 2026-01-13 (~117 days). Single catch-up flush 2026-01-14 of +1986.6 kWh. Implied rate 17/day across offline window matches the seasonal ramp from summer lows to winter ~30/day post-catchup. Patched via interpolate between clean endpoints 2025-09-19 (3178.95) and 2026-01-14 (5165.56). Synchronized with B311.VP1_VMM64 and B313.VP1_VMM62 — suggests building-level BMS communication outage.
Counter offline 2025-09-20 through 2026-01-13 (~117 days). Single catch-up flush 2026-01-14 of +45.6 kWh. Patched via interpolate. Synchronized with B310.VP2_VMM61 and B313.VP1_VMM62.
Counter offline 2025-09-22 through 2026-01-13 (~114 days). Single catch-up flush 2026-01-14 of +404.8 kWh. Patched via interpolate. Synchronized with B310.VP2_VMM61 and B311.VP1_VMM64 within 2 days.

B310 VARME formula (row 22): +VP2_VMM61 +VP1_VMM61 +VS2_VMM61 +VS2_VMM62 − 22 sub-meters across B301-B385. Sum of children exceeds parent side by ~2.5 MWh/yr (~200 kWh/month), producing steady negative residual all months. Two identified causes: (1) Excel bug — B385.VP2_VMM62 subtracted here (col Z) but never +added to B385's formula (row 64 only adds VP2_VMM61), losing ~106 kWh/yr from the accounting; (2) remaining ~2.4 MWh/yr gap likely calibration drift or unmetered physical bypass feeding sub-buildings without going through B310's four parent meters. Ontology mirrors Excel exactly. Needs facilities confirmation to determine if parent metering coverage is physically complete.

Excel row 38 (B327) double-counts B326.VS1_VMM61 — already a + term in row 37 for B326. One-parent-per-meter rule attached it to B326 per decisions.md. B327 topology therefore under-counts vs Excel by Δ(B326.VS1_VMM61) each month. Excel is immutable.
